name: Climbing Score LLC
description_short: Climbing Score LLC disputes negative items and errors on credit reports to improve consumer credit scores. Founded in 2018, they offer credit repair bundles ranging from $499 to $1,499 with personalized dispute services.
description_long:
Climbing Score LLC is a credit repair company based in New York that has been operating since 2018. The company positions itself as a solution for consumers dealing with credit problems, offering professional credit dispute and repair services rather than requiring consumers to navigate the process alone. They emphasize compliance, professionalism, and a personalized approach to each client's unique credit situation.

The company offers three primary service bundles: the Credit Kickstart Bundle ($499), Debt-Free Future Bundle ($799), and Total Credit Transformation Bundle ($1,499). Services include credit report analysis, personalized repair plans, credit monitoring, custom dispute letter preparation and submission to credit agencies, debt counseling, and ongoing support throughout the repair process. They claim an excellent track record in helping clients improve credit scores and provide a 100% money-back guarantee on their services.

Climbing Score distinguishes itself by emphasizing direct, personal involvement from case analysts and advisors throughout the credit repair journey. They highlight that their team has extensive experience with consumer, business, and mortgage credit, and stress that they prepare all documentation for credit agencies. The company positions credit repair as a legal consumer right and frames their service as enabling clients to achieve results faster and without costly errors that consumers might make independently.

While the company offers legitimate credit repair services backed by a money-back guarantee and no long-term binding contracts, potential clients should note that credit repair services cannot legally remove accurate negative information from credit reports—only errors and inaccuracies. The website contains minimal third-party testimonials or independent verification of their claimed track record, and their service pricing is relatively high compared to some competitors in the credit repair space.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Three tiered service bundles allowing customers to choose service level and price point
Personalized case analyst and advisor assigned to work with client throughout process
Covers consumer, business, and mortgage credit disputes
Free credit consultation, analysis, and recommendations offered upfront
Company prepares and submits all dispute documentation to credit agencies on client's behalf
cons: Service pricing ($499-$1,499) is substantial and may not be necessary since consumers can dispute errors themselves for free
Website contains minimal independent third-party reviews or verification of claimed track record and success rates
Credit repair services are limited to disputing errors and inaccuracies only—cannot remove accurate negative information regardless of service tier
Limited transparency about typical timelines for credit improvement or what percentage of disputes are typically successful
best_for: Consumers with multiple errors or inaccuracies on credit reports who prefer professional handling over self-representation
Busy professionals who lack time to research and dispute credit report errors independently
Individuals with complex credit situations involving consumer, business, and mortgage credit issues simultaneously

diagnosis: Climbing Score LLC is best for consumers with documented errors on their credit reports who want professional dispute handling and can afford the $499-$1,499 service fees. The critical caveat is that no credit repair company can legally remove accurate negative information—they can only dispute errors—so consumers should verify they actually have reportable inaccuracies before engaging paid services.
services: Dispute letter submission to credit agencies
Case analyst and advisor support throughout process
Ongoing support until credit issues are resolved
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
